Risk Description: n yesterday's QA Sync up call, we got to know that there is a new environment 'QA' going to get in which will be the final one. We do not know much about these details and on the timelines of this new environment yet. It looks like Global Helix may not satisfy certain of the production like aspects and hence this new environment. With Helix, QA created a very strict timelines to complete execution of all the requirements including re-testing every item that were initially tested in DevTest and Global Test. This also included one hour of additional work per day from each QA during Helix retesting period. This plan was already stringent, and any deviation would pose a risk in QA completion on time. Now, with this new environment, 'QA', we heard in the QA Sync up call that we may not need entire retesting as new 'QA' will be getting in. Rather a regression will be enough. Currently we do not have the details on the new 'QA' timelines. But this is going to be a risk for QA to complete as planned with the additional retesting getting in place. Also switching into multiple environments involves additional rework from QA. 'Helix' environment readiness check / regression 'QA' environment readiness check 'QA' environment retesting of all the executed requirements in DevTest, Global Test, Global Helix

Risk Description: Princess Cruises Lines is a brand that we support as part of global database administration support. As part of this support, we have automated monitoring of all parameters that will impact availability of databases. One of the key parameters monitored is storage, which results in an alert, if any mount / folder exceeds 80% used storage PCL has its own ServiceNow instance as against the global service now instance (carnival corp) that we use for converting our alerts into tickets for action. Due to lack of integration between Global and PCL ServiceNow instances, in case OS mount/folder points reach above threshold, our monitoring alerts are not reaching PCL ServiceNow for OS team action. As a result, storage alerts that need to be actioned by PCL System team will not be actioned timely leading to critical PCL database availability issues and huge impact for Business
Potential Impact: High - ServiceNow integration gaps can result in revenue loss and client relationship issues.
